text: when creating sub aim by drag and drop, take into account the expected aim size when calculating the initial distance.
description: otherwise aim is placed, size calculated, distance scaled. => aim not where we dragged => bad UI

status.comment: After connectAims + loadAims, await nextTick() so Vue's watcher updates newNode.r with the real post-connection radius. Then recompute relPos with the correct rSum, snap the node back to the drop position, update the simulation link in-place, and persist via updateConnectionPosition. Committed in 943964f.
